pythia_160m_pathology.interpretation: d_eff=126 indicates nearly all eigenvalues are comparable (no dominant direction). Whitening amplifies noise rather than correcting for it because the model has not developed sufficient Neural Collapse structure.

n14_update.interpretation: Cross-architecture whitened kappa fails because Sigma_W is model-specific. Whitening helps within-family (where noise structures are similar) but hurts across families. The n=10 PASS was a false positive from within-family homogeneity. Proxy A (raw kappa from W_U geometry alone) remains the correct cross-architecture metric.
